recommendations.title: Remove production debug statements
recommendations.description: Replace temporary print or console debug statements with structured application logging where necessary.
recommendations.reason: Detected leftover print/console.log statements in 3 files.
recommendations.expectedBenefit: Cleans up production logs and standardizes observability.

recommendations.title: Use descriptive commit messages
recommendations.description: Replace generic commit messages with clear action-oriented descriptions of the actual change.

recommendations.title: Avoid repeated commit messages
recommendations.description: Write commit messages that describe each individual change instead of repeatedly reusing the same message.
